zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues II de Ponthieu於大約1045年出生時，他的父親Hugues de Ponthieu II43歲，母親Bertha d'Aumale41歲。他和Helissende de Montreuil至少有2個兒子。他去世於1130年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯享年86歲。

zh-hans.Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime,: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉利吉-斯-普萊斯
zh-hans.Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, H: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues II de Ponthieu于大约1045年出生时，他的父亲Hugues de Ponthieu II43岁，母亲Bertha d'Aumale41岁。他和Helissende de Montreuil至少有2个儿子。他去世于1130年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues II de Ponthieu was born about 1045, his father, Hugues de Ponthieu II, was 43 and his mother, Bertha d'Aumale, was 41. He had at least 2 sons with Helissende de Montreuil. He died in 1130, in Artois, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues II de Ponthieu est né environ 1045, son père, Hugues de Ponthieu II, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Bertha d'Aumale, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Helissende de Montreuil. Il est décédé en 1130, à Artois, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues II de Ponthieu um 1045 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Ponthieu II 43 und seine Mutter Bertha d'Aumale 41. Er hatte mit Helissende de Montreuil mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1130 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Artois, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II de Ponthieu è nato il circa 1045, il suo padre, Hugues de Ponthieu II, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Bertha d'Aumale, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Helissende de Montreuil. Morì nel 1130, nel Artois, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: から1098年1月7日まで1100年1月6日

ja.Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime,: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-リクイエル-eス-プレインス

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Ponthieuが約1045年に生まれた時，父Hugues de Ponthieu IIは43歳，母Bertha d'Aumaleは41歳であった。彼はHelissende de Montreuilとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1130年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスアルトイスで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Ponthieu(이)가 대략 1045년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Ponthieu II(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha d'Aumale(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Helissende de Montreuil(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1130년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 아토이스에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

lv.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: no 1098. gada 7. janvāra līdz 1100. gada 6. janvārim

mn.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: 1098 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7-аас 1100 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 6 хүртэл

pt.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: de 7 de janeiro de 1098 a 6 de janeiro de 1100
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II de Ponthieu nasceu aproximadamente 1045, seu pai, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Bertha d'Aumale, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Helissende de Montreuil. Ele faleceu em 1130, em Artois, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues II de Ponthieu родился около 1045 г., его отцу по имени Hugues de Ponthieu II было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Bertha d'Aumale, 41. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Helissende de Montreuil. Он умер в 1130 г. в местности артоис, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 86 лет.

sm.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: mai le 7 Ianuari 1098 e o'o I le 6 Ianuari 1100

es.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: desde 7 de enero de 1098 hasta 6 de enero de 1100
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues II de Ponthieu nació aproximadamente 1045, su papá, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Bertha d'Aumale, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Helissende de Montreuil. Murió en 1130, en Artois, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 86 años.
